name: submit_datee_response
description: Submit the datee's response message and any detected gameplay signals.

tell.description: A detected tell signal, or null if none.

stat.description: The stat the tell relates to (e.g. Charm, Rizz, Wit).

description.description: Brief description of the tell behaviour.

weakness.description: A weakness window signal, or null if none.

defending_stat.description: The defending stat whose DC is reduced.

dc_reduction.description: How much the DC is reduced by (positive integer).
